card_mod.style:
ha-card { background: var(--ha-card-background, rgba(16,21,31,0.72)); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(157,110,240,0.25); border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px; }
ha-card { background: none !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; }

card.border-left: [[[ return entity.state === 'locked' ? '2px solid var(--accent-color, #00d4f0)' : entity.state === 'unlocked' ? '2px solid #f5a623' : '2px solid #f04060' ]]]

card_mod.style:
ha-card { border-left: 2px solid [[[ return entity.state === 'locked' ? '#00d4ff' : entity.state === 'unlocked' ? '#f5a623' : '#f04060' ]]]; border-radius: 14px; }
#icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }

ha-card { border-left: 2px solid [[[ return entity.state === 'locked' ? '#00d4ff' : entity.state === 'unlocked' ? '#f5a623' : '#f04060' ]]]; border-radius: 14px; }

ha-card { background: none !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; }
ha-card { border-left: 3px solid [[[ return entity.state === 'closed' ? '#10d090' : entity.state === 'open' ? '#f04060' : '#f5a623' ]]]; border-radius: 12px; }
ha-card { border-left: 3px solid [[[ return entity.state === 'closed' ? '#10d090' : entity.state === 'open' ? '#f04060' : '#f5a623' ]]]; border-radius: 12px; }

ha-card { background: transparent !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; min-height: 240px; } @media (min-width: 768px) { ha-card { min-height: 44vh; } }

ha-card { height: 100%; min-height: 100%; border: 2px solid #f04060; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(240,64,96,0.4); border-radius: 12px; } hui-image { height: 100% !important; } hui-image img, hui-image div { height: 100% !important; }

ha-card { height: 100%; min-height: 100%; border: 2px solid #00c8e8; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0,200,232,0.4); border-radius: 12px; } hui-image { height: 100% !important; } hui-image img, hui-image div { height: 100% !important; }

ha-card { height: 100%; min-height: 100%; border: 2px solid #00c8e8; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0,200,232,0.4); border-radius: 12px; } hui-image { height: 100% !important; } hui-image img, hui-image div { height: 100% !important; }

ha-card { background: transparent !important; border: 1px dashed rgba(138,154,184,0.22) !important; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: none !important; min-height: 240px; } @media (min-width: 768px) { ha-card { min-height: 44vh; } }
ha-card { background: none !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; }

'linear-gradient(to right,#4d8ef0,var(--accent-color, #00d4f0))' : 'linear-gradient(to right,#f0a030,#f06040)'; const minT = e.attributes.min_temp || 60; const maxT = e.attributes.max_temp || 90; const pct = setpoint !== '--' ? Math.min(100, Math.max(0, Math.round((setpoint - minT) / (maxT - minT) * 100))) : 40; const rl = "Living Room · Daikin"; return '

card.label:
[[[ const e = entity || {}; const state = e.state || 'unavailable'; const isPlaying = state === 'playing'; const isPaused = state === 'paused'; const attrs = e.attributes || {}; const track = attrs.media_title || (isPlaying || isPaused ? 'Unknown Track' : (state === 'idle' ? 'Nothing Playing' : 'Unavailable')); const artist = attrs.media_artist || ''; const stateLabel = {playing:'Playing',paused:'Paused',idle:'Idle',unavailable:'Unavailable',off:'Off'}[state] || state; const stateColorRgb = isPlaying ? '77,142,240' : isPaused ? '245,166,35' : '74,85,112'; const volPct = attrs.volume_level != null ? Math.round(attrs.volume_level * 100) : 0; const dur = attrs.media_duration || 0; const pos = attrs.media_position || 0; const updAt = attrs.media_position_updated_at; const elapsed = (isPlaying && updAt) ? pos + (Date.now() - new Date(updAt).getTime()) / 1000 : pos; const pct = dur > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round(elapsed / dur * 100)) : 0; const fmt = s => { const m = Math.floor(s/60); return m + ':' + String(Math.floor(s%60)).padStart(2,'0'); }; const playIconSvg = isPlaying ? '' : ''; const artUrl = attrs.entity_picture || null; const artHtml = artUrl ? '' : '
'; return '
' + '
' + '
' + '' + '
' + '
' + playIconSvg + '
' + '
' + '' + '
' + '
' + '
' + artHtml + '
' + '
' + track + '
' + (artist ? '
' + artist + '
' : '') + '
Benjamin\'s Room
' + '
' + '' + stateLabel + '' + '
' + (dur > 0 ? '
' + fmt(elapsed) + '' + fmt(dur) + '
' : '') + (volPct > 0 ? '
' + volPct + '%
' : '') + '
'; ]]]

chips.content: {% set f=is_state('lock.front_door_lock','locked') %}{% set b=is_state('lock.back_door_lock','locked') %}{% set g=is_state('lock.gemelli_door_lock','locked') %}{% set lg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746c3_door','closed') %}{% set rg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746b4_door','closed') %}{% if f and b and g and lg and rg %}All Secure{% elif not (f and b and g) %}Check Locks{% elif not (lg and rg) %}Garage Open{% else %}Check{% endif %}
chips.icon_color: {% set f=is_state('lock.front_door_lock','locked') %}{% set b=is_state('lock.back_door_lock','locked') %}{% set g=is_state('lock.gemelli_door_lock','locked') %}{% set lg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746c3_door','closed') %}{% set rg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746b4_door','closed') %}{% if f and b and g and lg and rg %}#10d090{% else %}#f04060{% endif %}

chips.content: {% set on_lights = states.light | selectattr('state','eq','on') | list | count %}{{ on_lights }} Lights On
chips.icon_color: {% set on_lights = states.light | selectattr('state','eq','on') | list | count %}{% if on_lights > 0 %}var(--accent-color, #00d4f0){% else %}#4a5570{% endif %}

chips.content: {% set t = state_attr('climate.daikin','current_temperature') %}{% if t != None %}{{ t | round(0) | int }}°F{% else %}--°F{% endif %}
